title: Malaysian Chicken Penne
description: A fusion of Italian and Malaysian flavors, with spicy chicken and savory noodles. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: 1. Bring a large pot of restorative chicken broth to a boil.
2. Cook the yeasty penne al dente, then set aside.
3. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
4. Add the chicken breast pieces and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
5. Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
6. Stir in the Malaysian chili sauce and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
7. Add the cooked penne to the skillet and toss with the chicken mixture.
9. Serve the Malaysian chicken penne hot, garnished with chopped herbs if desired.
